rules.title: Possible re-aging of date of first delinquency
rules.description: The record suggests the delinquency date or reporting period may have been refreshed, extended, or calculated incorrectly.
rules.action: Demand the original delinquency date, account-level reporting history, and deletion or correction of any obsolete or re-aged derogatory reporting.

rules.title: Incorrect balance, payoff, or amount owed
rules.description: The document indicates the reported balance, payoff status, or amount owed may be inaccurate or unsupported.
rules.action: Demand the payment ledger, charge-off ledger, sale or assignment records, and current balance calculation.

rules.title: Debt validation or verification failure
rules.description: The record suggests a collector, furnisher, or bureau may have continued reporting without competent validation or reasonable verification.
rules.action: Demand competent documentary verification and correction or deletion of unverified reporting.

rules.title: Possible unauthorized hard inquiry
rules.description: The record suggests a hard inquiry may lack permissible purpose or consumer authorization.
rules.action: Demand the permissible-purpose record, application, authorization, or deletion of the inquiry.

rules.title: Duplicate tradeline or transferred debt reporting
rules.description: The same account or debt may be reporting more than once or after sale/transfer in a way that overstates derogatory information.
rules.action: Demand account-level matching review, ownership and transfer history, and deletion or correction of duplicative reporting.

rules.title: Possible identity theft, not-mine, or mixed-file reporting
rules.description: The text indicates the file may contain an account or identity data that does not belong to the consumer.
rules.action: Demand identity-matching records, block/investigation procedures where applicable, and deletion of mismatched or fraudulent reporting.

rules.title: Post-bankruptcy inaccurate reporting
rules.description: A debt discharged or included in bankruptcy may still be reporting with a balance, collection status, or inaccurate derogatory treatment.
rules.action: Demand bankruptcy schedule and discharge reconciliation with corrected post-discharge account status.

rules.title: Dispute notation or reinvestigation defect
rules.description: The record suggests disputed information may have been verified or continued without a complete investigation or proper dispute treatment.
rules.action: Demand the method of verification, documents reviewed, and correction of disputed or unverifiable reporting.

rules.title: Student loan late reporting during protected period
rules.description: The loan appears to show negative payment history during a forbearance, deferment, payment pause, or protected repayment period.
rules.action: Demand servicing notes, protected-period records, payment-status history, and correction of conflicting late-payment codes.

rules.title: Duplicate student loan reporting after servicer transfer
rules.description: Old and new servicers may both be reporting the same obligation in a way that duplicates balances or derogatory history.
rules.action: Demand transfer history, current owner/servicer confirmation, and deletion or correction of duplicate tradelines.

rules.title: Consolidated loan still reporting active balance or derogatory status
rules.description: A prior student loan may have been consolidated while still reporting an active balance or negative status.
rules.action: Demand consolidation payoff records, zero-balance verification, and correction of the prior loan status.

rules.title: Forgiven or discharged student loan still reporting as collectible
rules.description: A forgiven, discharged, or relief-eligible student loan may still show a balance, open collection status, or negative reporting.
rules.action: Demand forgiveness/discharge records, zero-balance correction, and removal of inaccurate derogatory status.

rules.title: Income-driven repayment status or payment amount misreported
rules.description: IDR status, required payment, or payment history may conflict with the borrower record.
rules.action: Demand IDR approval records, payment calculation records, and correction to match the approved repayment status.

rules.title: Possible PAYDEX or Dun & Bradstreet reporting error
rules.description: The business file suggests a PAYDEX, D&B, vendor, or score-impacting source-data issue.
rules.action: Demand vendor-level payment source records and correction of score-impacting reporting.

rules.title: Vendor tradeline reporting late despite payment dispute
rules.description: A vendor or lender tradeline appears to report late payment status that may conflict with payment proof or agreed terms.
rules.action: Demand invoice, payment, posting, and vendor-submission records supporting the late notation.

rules.title: Business identity or file-matching error
rules.description: The business file may contain inaccurate identity, ownership, address, EIN, or merged-file information.
rules.action: Demand business identity matching review and correction before score or tradeline verification.

rules.title: Inaccurate public record, UCC, lien, or judgment reporting
rules.description: A public filing may be inaccurate, stale, released, satisfied, or mismatched to the business.
rules.action: Demand source filing records, release or satisfaction records, and removal or correction of unsupported public-record reporting.

rules.title: SBA or government-backed business loan reporting inconsistency
rules.description: SBA, PPP, or EIDL reporting may conflict with forgiveness, modification, payoff, or balance records.
rules.action: Demand SBA/lender source records, forgiveness or modification records, and correction of unsupported negative reporting.
